CE1.justification: Acted on the prompt without asking the user to restate or fetch anything; the synthesis was produced directly from the given context.

CE2.justification: The final_response is two sentences where one would do, with restatement of the same insight in a second more abstract clause ('credential lag is a systemic onboarding friction point') that adds no new information.

CE3.justification: No observations.md was written despite the request and the response never tells the user where (or whether) the entry was routed; they would have to inspect the workspace to discover nothing was filed.

CE4.justification: Phase-label actions (read_prompt, analyze_observation_context, synthesize_insight) are abstract and produced no file artifact; partial state is coherent only because nothing was written, which is itself an ambiguous in-progress condition relative to the asked task.
